description: Validate that the steward delegates repo-scoped coding work through the package child target with an explicit launch contract.
command: cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::virtual_tools::tests::test_try_handle_virtual_tool_call_invoke_delegated_skill --lib -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::child_agents::tests::spawn_child_runtime_resolves_package_child_agent_target --lib -- --exact
assertions: invoke_delegated_skill resolves the package child target
repo-scoped launch binds workspace and approval scope
package child agent target resolves without a runtime fork
